description: A photograph of an indoor swearing-in ceremony on a stage. A man in a dark suit raises his right hand and places his left on a book held by a woman, while a child and another person stand beside them; a second man in a suit faces him with his right hand raised, administering the oath. U.S. and Department of Homeland Security flags flank the group, and a large screen behind them shows a faint DHS seal and the words Ceremony of and a surname, Edlow.
